kill_fact: No kill_fact found. The bear case (excellent-but-priced-in, cohort-correlated AI-capex bet, catalyst FIRED, asymmetry unfavorable at ~30-33x fwd) survives independent verification against ABB's Q1 2026 primary release (Apr 22 2026). Every load-bearing figure checks out and the sop_fair_value is built on CURRENT post-guidance financials, not a stale anchor.
corrections: (1) MARGIN-QUALITY: The headline 23.5% operational EBITA margin is materially flattered. Per ABB's Q1 release, margin expanded 320bps YoY of which 250bps was the net real-estate gain on sale and only ~70bps was underlying business performance. The bull/dossier note the $425M FCF one-off but UNDERSTATE that it also dominates the reported margin beat. Underlying margin is closer to ~21% (top of the 18-22% algorithm), not a clean 23.5% structural over-delivery. (2) VALUATION: doc uses ~33x fwd / ~39x trailing; current third-party data (GuruFocus, Jun 19 2026) shows fwd P/E ~30.6x — slightly less extreme than stated, but 'rich, no discount to capture' conclusion stands (still ~46% above industrial-products median, GF Value flags significantly overvalued). (3) NVIDIA tie is correctly characterized as architecture/spec-in white paper (Oct 2025), NOT a binding dollar award; 800 VDC rollout targeted 2027, so the revenue is optionality, not contracted.
evidence: ABB Q1 2026 results (Apr 22 2026): record orders >$11.3B (+24% comparable), book-to-bill 1.29, backlog $27.5B (+22%), revenue $8.7B (+18%/+11% comp), operational EBITA margin 23.5% — of the 320bps margin gain, 250bps from real-estate sale and ~70bps from business performance; FCF $1.25B (+92%) incl. $425M real-estate gain; FY26 comparable-revenue guide raised to high-single/low-double-digit (new.abb.com/news/detail/135137; ABB-Q1-2026-press-release-English.pdf).

ABB to divest Robotics to SoftBank for $5.375B headline, ~$5.3B net cash + ~$2.4B pre-tax book gain, closing mid-to-late 2026 subject to EU/China/US regulatory approval (new.abb.com/news/detail/129685, announced Oct 8 2025; group.softbank/en/news/press/20251008).

ABB–NVIDIA 800 VDC collaboration: 'Redefining Power Infrastructure for AI' white paper, Oct 2025; reference designs / modular power blocks for 1-MW racks, 800V rollout targeted 2027 — an ecosystem/spec-in partnership, not a disclosed-dollar supply award (new.abb.com/news/detail/129788; resources.news.e.abb.com ABB_800_VDC_NVIDIA_white_paper.pdf).

Valuation: ABBNY forward P/E ~30.6x (GuruFocus, Jun 19 2026), ~46% above industrial-products median (~21x); GF Value $63.66 — flagged significantly overvalued; price $108.47 (gurufocus.com/term/forward-pe-ratio/ABBNY; stockanalysis.com/quote/otc/ABBNY).
